column1: # Manual indicator readings for BHARTIARTL — Indian market session 2026-05-14.
# Fill the `expected_value` column with what YOU see on your chart.
# Leave bot_value and delta blank — the comparison script will fill those.
# Take ALL readings at the same wall-clock time so they refer to the same
# bar — e.g. read everything at 11:50 IST. Note that time in `reading_time_ist`
# (the same value across all rows is fine).
# Bot uses the LAST CLOSED bar. If your chart shows a live (in-progress) bar
# scroll back one to compare apples-to-apples.
# Source: where you read the value (TV / Fyers / Kite / Dhan / Investing).
# Setup TV chart for parity: Exchange=NSE
#   PDH / PDL / PDC  previous trading day high / low / close
#   ADX / DI_plus / DI_minus    ADX(14) and directional indicators
#   volume_ratio     today's vol / 10-day avg vol  (the bot's microstructure metric)
#   pivot/R1/R2/S1/S2   classic floor pivots from PDH/PDL/PDC
